author: Pixar YouTube
text:
"You've Got a Friend in Me" Recreated with Toys & Tech! | ASM(pixa)R
‪@JoePorterPercussion recreates the iconic song, "You've Got a Friend in Me" from Toy Story with toy and tech instruments.

► SUBSCRIBE to the channel to get notified when new Pixar videos are posted: https://www.youtube.com/pixar?sub_confirmation=1
